purpose: HTML5 shell for the original Portal "Still Alive" end credits recreation. It declares the lyric, credit, and picture containers that portal/cake.js fills at runtime, loads style.css, cakedata.js, and cake.js in that order, and includes a fullscreen #splash overlay that gates the credits sequence behind a user click/keypress to satisfy modern autoplay policy. Script tags use defer so parsing isn't blocked.
invariants: cakedata.js must load before cake.js because cake.js reads global asciiart, credits, and lyrics.
The lyrics, credits, and picture container ids are runtime API for portal/cake.js and portal/style.css.
The #splash element with id 'splash' is the autoplay-policy gate; portal/cake.js queries it on DOMContentLoaded and dismisses it on click or Space.

Declares UTF-8 via <meta http-equiv> so the browser parses cake.js (and any non-ASCII content) as UTF-8 rather than guessing Latin-1; without this the page renders 'Â' artifacts wherever the JS source contained literal NBSP bytes.
gotchas: HTML5 markup with no viewport meta; layout behavior is intentionally fixed-size desktop.
Splash overlay styles are inline in <head>; removing the inline <style> block breaks the splash gate visually.
